# The Ajax Line — candidate thesis map

> **Blocked unpublished candidate.** This map is an argument-control surface, not a factual accusation or release authorization. 17 of 18 claims remain blocked, quarantined, or retired.

Law firms should independently preserve control over firm-specific professional interaction graphs and their derivatives because, if external AI systems are permitted to retain and generalize substantially overlapping multi-firm signals, a sector-level capability externality could erode differentiation—even though current registered evidence does not establish that Anthropic or another named provider is doing so.

| # | Spine node | Status | Bounded proposition | Objection / falsifier | What it does not prove | Gate |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | TMN-0001 · asset<br>CLM-0014 | mixed | Firm-specific value can reside in context-to-choice-to-rationale-to-outcome relationships, not merely in standalone documents. | OBJ-0003<br>Falsifier: FAL-0002 | Ownership, legal protectability, uniqueness, portability, technical learnability, or economic value. | blocked_review |
| 2 | TMN-0002 · observable design<br>CLM-0001, CLM-0002, CLM-0017 | observed | Pinned legal materials invite users to encode playbooks, fallbacks, deviations, rationales, risk posture, precedent, and house style. | OBJ-0001<br>Falsifier: FAL-0001 | Actual tenant configuration, data movement, retention, training, connector execution, or deployed runtime equivalence. | blocked_review |
| 3 | TMN-0003 · conditional exposure<br>CLM-0003, CLM-0004, CLM-0018 | mixed | Connectors, feedback, support, telemetry, or hosted features could expose professional signals if material leaves firm custody and reuse is permitted. | OBJ-0001, OBJ-0002<br>Falsifier: FAL-0001 | That a named provider currently captures, retains, pools, trains on, or generalizes a firm's ontology. | blocked_review |
| 4 | TMN-0004 · sector externality<br>CLM-0015 | hypothesis | If overlapping multi-firm professional traces are legally and technically reusable, resulting capability could reduce the scarcity of firm-specific capability. | OBJ-0002, OBJ-0005<br>Falsifier: FAL-0002 | Present harm, provider intent, data aggregation, antitrust violation, transferability, substitutability, or inevitability. | blocked_review |
| 5 | TMN-0005 · ajax line<br>CLM-0003, CLM-0015, CLM-0016 | normative | Each firm should independently control ontology, derivatives, telemetry, evaluation, portability, and exit while preserving lawful unilateral decision-making. | OBJ-0002, OBJ-0003<br>Falsifier: FAL-0001, FAL-0002 | Guaranteed security, competitive superiority, compliance, provider wrongdoing, or business survival. | blocked_review |
| 6 | TMN-0006 · move 37 horizon<br>CLM-0011, CLM-0012, CLM-0013 | hypothesis | Legal-AI research should test unconventional delayed-value strategies, while treating Move 37 as analogy and benchmark motivation only. | OBJ-0004, OBJ-0005<br>Falsifier: FAL-0003 | That an AlphaGo moment exists in law, that Go predicts legal performance, or that private expert traces are necessary. | blocked_review |
| 7 | TMN-0007 · present boundary<br>CLM-0003, CLM-0010, CLM-0017, CLM-0018 | unknown | No evidence currently registered in this project establishes covert pooling of identifiable firm ontologies or default training on ordinary commercial content. | OBJ-0001<br>Falsifier: FAL-0001 | Impossibility, flawless compliance, zero processing or retention, absence of negotiated differences, or harmlessness. | blocked_review |

## Evidence and release boundary

- Exact reproducible reviewed path today: `SRC-0002 → chk:sha256:df2e…6227 → CLM-0002` for the bounded deployment-script observation only.
- Candidate static-design chunk bindings now also exist for `CLM-0001` cold-start, deal-debrief, and playbook-monitor spans; they remain blocked pending independent review.
- Every other path remains visibly candidate or unknown until its registered locator, review state, and claim gate pass.
- Iliad/Trojan-War material is naming or possible epigraph material only; Move 37 is analogy and benchmark motivation, never causal evidence.
- No public release is authorized. Human approval of the exact frozen export hash remains mandatory.
